title: crypsinus trilobus
intro: Crypsinus trilobus, also known as the Japanese or Chinese wintergreen, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, making it useful for relieving pain and reducing inflammation. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Crypsinus trilobus is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and can be used externally as a poultice or ointment to treat skin conditions and wounds.
